name: grain__remote-mcp
description: Official remote MCP server for Grain - AI meeting recording and notetaking. Search and fetch meeting transcripts, AI notes, action items, clips, stories, and deal intelligence.
instructions:
**⚠️ Deal intelligence and coaching tools require a Grain Business or Enterprise plan.** `fetch_deal`, `list_all_deals`, and the coaching-feedback tools return errors on Free and Starter plans even after a successful OAuth connection. Core meeting tools (transcripts, notes, search, clips) work on all plans.

**⚠️ The agent sees exactly what your Grain account sees.** Access respects your existing Grain workspace permissions — no extra scoping is available, and the tool set includes write actions (creating clips, stories, and collections).

1. Connect with just the server URL `https://api.grain.com/_/mcp` — no client ID or secret needed. Grain supports OAuth 2.0 dynamic client registration with PKCE and registers the client automatically.
2. Your browser opens Grain's authorization page; sign in and click **Approve**.
3. That's it — there is no workspace toggle or admin enablement step to flip first.

Notes:

- Grain does not use OAuth scopes; what you can access is determined by your Grain plan and account permissions.
- The official docs list a subset of tools from the June 2025 launch; the live server exposes more (action items, clips, stories, collections).

Docs: https://developers.grain.com/mcp

tools.name: list_meetings
tools.description: List all accessible meetings with optional filters

tools.name: fetch_meeting
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific meeting

tools.name: fetch_meeting_transcript
tools.description: Retrieve the full transcript of a meeting

tools.name: fetch_meeting_notes
tools.description: Get AI-generated meeting notes (more concise than transcripts)

tools.name: fetch_meeting_action_items
tools.description: Get action items captured from a meeting

tools.name: search_in_transcripts
tools.description: Semantic search across all meeting transcripts

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Find companies that participated in meetings

tools.name: create_clip
tools.description: Create a shareable clip from a meeting recording

tools.name: create_story
tools.description: Create a story that combines clips

tools.name: list_workspace_users
tools.description: Get all users in your Grain workspace
